title: Commissioner Šuica meets Israeli authorities and Palestinian Authority
content:
Today and tomorrow, Commissioner for the Mediterranean, Dubravka Šuica, will meet with Israeli authorities and the Palestinian Authority to reiterate the EU's support for peace and stability in the Middle East.
In Jerusalem, she will meet with Israeli President Isaac Herzog and Foreign Minister...

title: Commission publishes first annual social report on fisheries, aquaculture and fish processing
content: The European Commission has published the first annual social report on fisheries, aquaculture and processing sectors, providing an overview of the social aspects of all three sectors. The report, prepared by the Scientific, Technical and Economic Committee for Fisheries (STECF),

title: EU-Moldova Summit in Brussels marks a new milestone on path to EU membership
content: Today, the second EU-Moldova Summit marked another step forward in EU–Republic of Moldova relations and underscored the country's remarkable progress on its EU path.
snippet: Today, the second EU-Moldova Summit marked another step forward in EU–Republic of Moldova relations and underscored the country's remarkable progress on its EU path.

title: Opening remarks by President von der Leyen at the EU-Moldova Summit
content: A very warm welcome. It is wonderful to have you here for our second EU-Moldova Summit.
snippet: A very warm welcome. It is wonderful to have you here for our second EU-Moldova Summit.

title: The United Kingdom becomes Observer Country to the European Migration Network
content: The United Kingdom joined the European Migration Network (EMN) as an Observer Country on 19 June 2026, reinforcing cooperation and information exchange on migration and asylum. Learn more about it.
snippet: The United Kingdom joined the European Migration Network (EMN) as an Observer Country on 19 June 2026, reinforcing cooperation and information exchange on migration and asylum. Learn more about it.

title: Operation ZAFIRO: the Largest Coordinated General Aviation Operation to Date
content: Operation ZAFIRO is the third international coordinated operation under the COLIBRI Project, a partnership between the European Union (EU) and the World Customs Organization (WCO).
snippet: Operation ZAFIRO is the third international coordinated operation under the COLIBRI Project, a partnership between the European Union (EU) and the World Customs Organization (WCO).

title: Report reveals the skills, sectors and trends driving a sustainable ocean future
content: The blue economy is experiencing significant growth driven by sustainability objectives, technological innovation, climate action and emerging ocean industries.
snippet: The blue economy is experiencing significant growth driven by sustainability objectives, technological innovation, climate action and emerging ocean industries.

title: President von der Leyen co-hosts EU-Moldova Summit in Brussels
content: On Monday, President of the European Commission Ursula von der Leyen and President of the European Council António Costa will host the second EU-Moldova Summit.
snippet: On Monday, President of the European Commission Ursula von der Leyen and President of the European Council António Costa will host the second EU-Moldova Summit.

title: EU delivers €34 million in immediate support to Armenia as announced by President von der Leyen
content: Today, the European Commission has disbursed €34 million to Armenia to help mitigate the impact of Russia's trade restrictions on the country's private sector. Just two weeks after President von der Leyen's call with Prime Minister Pashinyan...

title: Support for EU accession remains high across enlargement partners, latest surveys show
content: Today, the European Commission published the results of the latest perception surveys on enlargement among citizens in the Western Balkans, Eastern Neighbourhood and Türkiye. The findings show that support for EU accession remains strong across the enlargement partners...

title: Inaccurate clothing labels a systemic issue, EU testing finds
content: Testing of 132 clothing items during an EU campaign found that their labels did not correctly reflect the materials used in 49 samples (37%).
snippet: Testing of 132 clothing items during an EU campaign found that their labels did not correctly reflect the materials used in 49 samples (37%).

title: Radio-controlled toys tested for signal interference
content: EU-funded testing of 88 radio-controlled toys for 3-14-year-olds found that 53 (60 %) failed to meet EU standards for interference.
snippet: EU-funded testing of 88 radio-controlled toys for 3-14-year-olds found that 53 (60 %) failed to meet EU standards for interference.

title: Electronic products tested for hazardous substances
content: EU-funded testing campaign for levels of hazardous substances in 173 electric and electronic gadgets found that half exceeded the permitted limits.
snippet: EU-funded testing campaign for levels of hazardous substances in 173 electric and electronic gadgets found that half exceeded the permitted limits.

title: EU-funded technology strengthening Europe’s security
content: On 17-18 June, the Commission showcased how innovative EU-funded European technologies will help European law enforcement authorities to fight cross-border organised crime and terrorism with faster, more accurate and interoperable identification and detection technology.

title: Biomethane Mechanism: Connecting buyers and sellers
content: The European Commission has officially launched today the Biomethane Mechanism, a key initiative under the EU Energy and Raw Materials Platform. Designed to accelerate the growth of Europe’s biomethane market, the mechanism is a voluntary, free of charge and innovative tool.
